summary.original: Creating algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration. Use this when users request creating art using code, generative art, algorithmic art, flow fields, or particle systems. Create original algorithmic art rather than copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.

description.original: Creating algorithmic art using p5.js with seeded randomness and interactive parameter exploration. Use this when users request creating art using code, generative art, algorithmic art, flow fields, or particle systems. Create original algorithmic art rather than copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: 算法艺术创作指南。Agent-OPT 将官方 SKILL.md 适配为独立 Web 技能工作室：支持章节导航、全文检索、中英对照元数据与只读源码呈现；不执行上游脚本，不访问外部账号。

notes: In-process skill runtime reads only catalog/skill-bodies/<slug> files prepared at curation time.
Upstream scripts, if any, are not executed by Agent-OPT.
No network, credentials, or host filesystem access is granted to the skill body.
Official path-addressed skill with preserved source text and dedicated Web skill studio.
Marked verified after in-process core/scenario/error/web tests of the skill reader runtime for this body snapshot.
Chinese UI labels and summary reviewed; original SKILL.md body remains English source text.

tests.evidence: Skill body loaded from catalog/skill-bodies and outline/list tools returned structured sections.
Representative section open + keyword search returned line excerpts from the official body.
Empty query and unknown section id rejected with controlled validation errors.
SkillWorkspace route renders outline and can open a section through the invoke API.
Runtime only reads curated skill-body files; no network/commands/secrets granted.
